title: Living in Boulder vlog 7 - 28 - 2017: Plattner & Ashby Buildings of Rome Book

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a morning vlog from Boulder, recapping his day: picking up his repaired car (with a broken washer as a side effect), and making progress on a web project cataloging buildings of Rome from the Plattner & Ashby book, organized alphabetically with ~2,000 entries. He expects to finish the project within the week.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Believes his site will be the only interactive directory of ancient Rome buildings of its kind
Wants to finish the Rome book project by end of the week even if it requires extra work
Wishes he had a faster computer earlier in the project
